'''鈭歞-g-v-k''' ('''kadagvekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unabolish|unabolish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unabolish|unabolish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-g-v-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadagvekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
